member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressGenerator
member.summary: Generates fortress map from world tile context per MAPGEN_PIPELINE.md section 4.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressMap
member.summary: Represents the generated fortress map data.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressChunk
member.summary: Represents a single chunk in the fortress map.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper
member.summary: Maps between old hardcoded TerrainType enum and new data-driven geology system.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetGeologyId(HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainType)
member.summary: Get the geology ID for a terrain type.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetTerrainType(System.String)
member.summary: Get the terrain type from geology ID (for backwards compatibility).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetBiomeStrata(HumanFortress.Core.World.BiomeType)
member.summary: Get geological strata for a biome.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetBiomeSurface(HumanFortress.Core.World.BiomeType)
member.summary: Get the surface terrain for a biome.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetGeologyHandle(HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainType)
member.summary: Convert terrain type to geology data handle for efficient storage.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetTerrainDisplay(HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainType)
member.summary: Get display information from geology data.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetNavCost(HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainType)
member.summary: Get navigation cost from geology data.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainTypeMapper.GetOreChance(HumanFortress.WorldGen.TerrainType)
member.summary: Get ore spawn chance for a terrain type.
